SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.hydrogen

Class HydrogenPlantBuilderBase

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.hydrogen.HydrogenPlantBuilderBase
Direct Known Subclasses:
ATRHydrogenPlantBuilder, POXHydrogenPlantBuilder, SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder
abstract class HydrogenPlantBuilderBase extends Object
Shared stream factory methods for hydrogen-production plant builders.

The helper creates simple methane, steam, oxygen, fuel, and air streams with the syngas product components seeded at trace amounts so equilibrium reactors can form hydrogen, carbon monoxide, and carbon dioxide without requiring callers to remember the component bookkeeping.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors

  • Method Details

    • createMethaneSteamFeed

      protected Stream createMethaneSteamFeed(String name, double methaneMolesPerSec, double steamToCarbon, double temperatureK, double pressureBara)
      Creates a methane and steam feed stream.
      Parameters:
      name - stream name
      methaneMolesPerSec - methane flow in mole/sec
      steamToCarbon - steam-to-carbon molar ratio
      temperatureK - feed temperature in Kelvin
      pressureBara - feed pressure in bara
      Returns:
      configured stream

    • createMethaneSteamOxygenFeed

      protected Stream createMethaneSteamOxygenFeed(String name, double methaneMolesPerSec, double steamToCarbon, double oxygenToCarbon, double temperatureK, double pressureBara)
      Creates a methane, steam, and oxygen feed stream.
      Parameters:
      name - stream name
      methaneMolesPerSec - methane flow in mole/sec
      steamToCarbon - steam-to-carbon molar ratio
      oxygenToCarbon - oxygen-to-carbon molar ratio
      temperatureK - feed temperature in Kelvin
      pressureBara - feed pressure in bara
      Returns:
      configured stream

      protected Stream createAir(String name, double oxygenMolesPerSec, double temperatureK, double pressureBara)
